<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by cmd/docgen — do not edit by hand -->
# label plugin

Adds and removes labels on issues and pull requests via slash commands.

## Triggers

GitHub `issue_comment` webhook event.

## Slash commands

### `/label`

Adds a label to the issue or PR. Supports `category/name`, `category:name`, or `category name` syntax.

```
/label <label-name>
```

### `/unlabel` / `/remove-label`

Removes a label from the issue or PR. Supports `category/name`, `category:name`, or `category name` syntax.

```
/unlabel <label-name>
```

## Notes

- When `labels.yml` is configured, category-specific commands are generated automatically: `/<category> <label>` adds `<category>/<label>` and `/un<category> <label>` removes it. For example, `/kind bug` adds the `kind/bug` label and `/unkind bug` removes it.
